global_description: Small arachnid with a compact, rounded body, eight long, jointed legs, typically covered in fine hairs. Colors vary from brown to black, sometimes with distinctive patterns. The body consists of a cephalothorax and an abdomen, connected by a narrow waist. Eyes are usually clustered on the front of the head.

part_details.cephalothorax: Front segment with eyes and mouthparts, often hairy

spatial_relations: Cephalothorax connected to abdomen by narrow waist
Legs extend from sides of cephalothorax
Eyes positioned on front of cephalothorax
